title: dioscorea tenuifolia
intro: Dioscorea tenuifolia, also known as Chinese yam or mountain yam, is a species of flowering plant in the yam family Dioscoreaceae, native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea tenuifolia include reducing inflammation and improving blood sugar control, as well as supporting bone health and immune function. Dioscorea tenuifolia is commonly prepared as a herbal decoction or tea, as well as being used in capsule or powder form, to harness its medicinal properties.
